problem: What physical process in the brain produces subjective conscious experience?
mechanism: Fear memory reconsolidation interference via timing
hypothesis: Fear memory reconsolidation interference via timing may resolve What physical process in the brain produces subjective conscious experience? by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Longitudinal patient cohort with 32 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
